sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀνακαλύπτω

- Transliteration: Anakalupto

- Phonetic: an-ak-al-oop'-to

- Definition:

1. to unveil or uncover (by drawing back a veil)

- Origin: from G303 (in the sense of reversal) and G2572

- TDNT entry: 12:20,4

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 (in the sense of reversal) and G2572; to unveil: - open ([un-]) taken away.
